utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format consists of 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check each item in the final package:

2. travel_dates – present and fully specified (September 4–9, 2024).
3. transportation – flight details included with costs, fully specified (airline, airports, class, price, baggage inclusion).
4. accommodation – fully specified (hotel name, type, location, price, total cost, amenities).
5. activities – at least one activity fully specified (name, type, duration, price, currency, difficulty, included items).
6. additional_services – included (insurance, cancellation policy). Fully specified.
7. total_budget – included (total cost, currency, limit, compliance). Fully specified.
All 7 items appear and are fully detailed according to the requested format.
